title: Bobo's Supermarket 2
description: A mod that produces a large amount of food
body:
Bobo's Supermarket 2 is the second part of the "Bobo's Supermarket" mod, which adds a huge amount of various popular food to the game in minecraft!

The mod supports two languages: English (EN) and Русский (RU)
This mod is currently released for Minecraft 1.14.4, 1.15.2, 1.16.5 and 1.17.1.
